filename: iPDC culture for 384-48 wells for drug treatment _flowcytometry_scSeq.docx
relative_path: Protocols, instructions/Tissue dissociation, organoids and iPDCs/iPDC culture for 384-48 wells for drug treatment _flowcytometry_scSeq.docx
full_text:
Cell count 1):

total: E6

live: E6

viability: %

Size: um

Cell count 2):

total: E6

live: E6

viability: %

Size: um

Total cell count: E6 / mL

Total volume: mL

A) Drug treatment for IF in 384-well plate

Leave outer wells empty = in total plate 308 wells Make the final mix for 384 wells due loss during pipetting.

384 wells x 20 µl = 7680 µl

prepare the mix for 384 wells 1000 cells/µl = 7.7E6 cells needed in total

→ make 4 x of 920 µl omegel plus cells mixture  in a 1.5 ml tube, and 1000 ul medium in a reservoir

→ 1000 cells/µl*7680 ul= 7.7 E6 divided into 4 tubes= 1.9 E6 per tube

volume to take from cell suspension (µl) for 920 ul of omentum gel mix *4 tubes

ORG full medium + cells →  765.6 µl

ome-gel       →    130         µl

aprotinin     →   3.0         µl

thrombin    →    3.0         µl

fibrinogen  →    18.4         µl

NOTE: Fibrinogen should be added just before pipetting to the wells. So, add everything to all 4 tubes except Fibrinogen. When you are ready to pipette add Fibrinogen one by one to each tube.

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 25 µl medium

→ Next day add drugs using Tecan drug dispenser

B). Flow cytometry / Single cell sequencing of the cultured (control sample)

A) Flow organoid (16 drops) + single-cell sequencing (20 drops):

48-well plate

Flow + SC: 36 wells x 40 µl x = 1440 µl → round up to 1500 uL

1000 cells/µl = 1.5E6

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 750 µl each

→ 1000 cells/µl = 0.75 E6/tube

ORG full medium + cells → 579.5 µl

ome-gel      → 106 µl

aprotinin     → 2.5 µl

thrombin    → 2.3 µl

fibrinogen  → 15 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

C). Flow cytometry for single and combination with STINGa

9 conditions * 6 replicates= 54 wells make it for 55 wells

48-well plate * 2 plates

55 x 40 µl x = 2200µl

1000 cells/µl = 2.2E6 = divide them into 2 tubes

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs,1.1 ml each

→ 1000 cells/µl = 1.1 E6/tube

ORG full medium + cells → 579.5 µl

ome-gel      → 157 µl

aprotinin     → 3.7 µl

thrombin    → 3.3 µl

fibrinogen  → 22 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 300 uL medium

-> next day add 50 ul per well 7x diluted drugs

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect approximately 1E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer in two different tubes for antibody staining and unstained control. If the number of cells are limited skip unstained control.

E) Sample for cryo

→ Collect remaining cells in 1mL of stem cell banker (x 1-2 vials)

Medium required for culturing

For 384 wells 25ul*384=9.6 ml

For 48 wells control, 350ul*40 wells = 14 ml

For 46 wells drug treatment 300*55= 16.5 ml

Prepare ml of iPDC medium with cytokines

plate (1): For Flow & SC

Drops plated on 48 well suspension culture plates (CellStar, #677102)

Next day:

Cultures:

Cultures had some multicellular clusters, all looking very healthy. Some small debris also, but not too much to harm the cultures.

Treatment:

NOTE! New STINGa concentrations were used: 0.01 - 0.025 - 0.1 - 1 uM. (Instead of the old 0.1 - 0.4 - 0.7 - 1 uM). The new concentrations were given by GSK people in October 2022. Since then we have not had any new 384-well plates to treat. The old concentrations were given by GSK people in December 2021.

Pembrolizumab was freshly diluted to 3.0 mg/ mL in 0.3% Tween-20:

c1v1 = c2v2 (for diluting Pembro)

5.0 mg/mL x v1 = 3.0 mg /mL x 20 uL

v1 = 12 uL

---

c1v1 = c2v2 (for diluting tween-20)

100 % of tween-20 x v1 = 0.75% x 10 mL of PBS (excess amount is prepared due to the viscosity of tween-20; use the mixture within 1 month).

v1 = 75 uL

--

=> 12 uL of 5.0 mg /mL Pembro + 8 uL of 0.75% tween-20 in PBS = 20 uL of 3.0 mg/mL Pembro in 0.3% tween-20

--

Drops were fixed after 4 days in culture. Samples on the 384 well plate were first stained with live-or-dye staining before fixing with 4% PFA for 40 mins. Cells were then stained with Hoechst, CK7 (568nm) and CD45 (647 nm)

Reagent | Cat.no
Supplier | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | In house | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | A6279
Sigma | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | T6884
Sigma | 100U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 341578
Sigma | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
